title: extra tools
description: a mod that adds a new iron tool called the rapier to minecraft
body: its a simple iron rapier . a new version will come adding more stuff . this mod adds a new item called iron rapier to minecraft . a iron rapier is better than a iron sword . it can be crafted with a handle , 2 iron ingots and 3 iron nuggets . a handle can be crafted with 2 lether stripes and a stick . 6 lether stripes can crafted with a single leater
